title: Add Nano Banana property images to the landing page

requirements.text: Source and integrate a curated set of visually appealing property/lifestyle images from Nano Banana (https://nanobanana.com) into the landing page sections — particularly the HeroSection background, FeaturesSection cards, and/or AboutSection — replacing or supplementing any existing placeholder imagery with these new assets stored in frontend/public/assets/generated.

quotes: can you add images from nano banana?

acceptanceCriteria: New images from Nano Banana are displayed in at least the HeroSection and one other section (e.g., FeaturesSection or AboutSection).
Images are stored as static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated.
Images match the warm terracotta/earth-tone visual style of the site.
All images load correctly and are properly sized for their respective sections.
No broken image links or missing asset references exist after the update.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
Preserve the existing terracotta and earth-tone color scheme defined in frontend/src/index.css.
All new images must be served as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated — do not route them through the backend.
nonGoals: Adding any new backend logic or data models.
Changing the overall page layout or section structure.
Replacing the Formspree contact form integration.

required: Warm-toned aerial or street-level view of colonial-style residential buildings with terracotta rooftops and lush greenery, Querétaro style (hero-nano-banana.dim_1920x1080.png)
Elegant furnished living room interior with warm earth tones, natural light, and modern colonial decor (feature-accommodations.dim_800x600.png)
Charming cobblestone street or plaza in a colonial Mexican town with colorful facades and blue sky (feature-locations.dim_800x600.png)
Welcoming handshake or couple meeting a real estate agent in a bright, airy setting (feature-service.dim_800x600.png)
Happy family or couple enjoying a sunny terrace or courtyard of a Mexican colonial home (feature-personalized.dim_800x600.png)
Warm portrait-style photo of a professional real estate team in front of a colonial building (about-team.dim_900x700.png)
